Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

GenericDoneDryingDrying in rainDone not meatDrying not meatDrying in rain not meatDone saltBurnt

Large Drying Rack is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the decoration score reaches 90 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 80 points. It can only be built within the Crabby Hermit's area.

The Large Drying Rack is a 9-slot Drying Rack. It can dry Kelp Fronds and produce Salt Crystals.

Contents

  • 1 Dryable Items
  • 2 Seaside Debris
  • 3 Skins
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Dryable Items

The list of possible Food that can be dried:

Item Dried Time required Spoil Timer
2 days 20 days
1 day 20 days
1 day 15 days
2 days 20 days
1 day 20 days
0.5 day 15 days
1 day 15 days
1 day x
1 day x
1 day x
1 day x
1 day x
1 day x
1 day x
1 day x
0.25 days 20 days

Seaside Debris

If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, Large Drying Rack at the original location will turn into Seaside Debris and can no longer be used. Even if Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Large Drying Rack will remain abandoned and cannot be used.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Event skin does not drop normally. Instead, it is usable by everyone during the official Winter's Feast event.
Woven - Elegant

Add a large amount of deliciously fishy kick to your jerky!

Large Drying Rack
"Pearl's personal drying rack has room to spare!"

GenericDoneDryingDrying in rainDone not meatDrying not meatDrying in rain not meatDone saltBurnt
“These really are drying times.”
–Wilson
“Nice, but burning still beats drying.”
–Willow
“Big and mighty dry rack!”
–Wolfgang
“One can dry much on there. How optimistic.”
–Wendy
“HIGH CAPACITY DRYING UNIT”
–WX-78
“This drying rack has a larger capacity.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a lot of drying space.”
–Woodie
“Hm. Why didn't we think of this sooner?”
–Maxwell
“Quite a förmidable drying rack!”
–Wigfrid
“We can dry so many things!”
–Webber
“Industrial size!”
–Warly
“Big unwet”
–Wormwood
“It's a jumbo!”
–Winona
“Oh my, let's dry!”
–Wortox
“Dry many dry stuff.”
–Wurt
“Oooh, we can dry so many things, Woby!”
–Walter
“Drying is slow. This helps.”
–Wanda
“Jerky time!”
–Wilson
“Hey lady, your stuff's all dry!”
–Willow
“Everything so dry.”
–Wolfgang
“The drying is over.”
–Wendy
“DEHYDRATION COMPLETE”
–WX-78
“The process has completed.”
–Wickerbottom
“That looks done.”
–Woodie
“Does she even have teeth?”
–Maxwell
“The möisture has been vanquished!”
–Wigfrid
“Ma'am! It's dry!”
–Webber
“The drying is complete!”
–Warly
“Done”
–Wormwood
“Ready for de-rack.”
–Winona
“It's dried with no place to hide.”
–Wortox
“Crabby lady! Dry stuff ready now!”
–Wurt
“Your dried goods are ready, ma'am!”
–Walter
“It's done! Finally!!”
–Wanda
“Drying takes time.”
–Wilson
“Come on, dry already!”
–Willow
“Dry things! Dry!”
–Wolfgang
“It sways in the drying wind.”
–Wendy
“PLEASE WAIT FOR DRYING TO COMPLETE”
–WX-78
“Dehydration is a slow process.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is like watching water dry.”
–Woodie
“Still moist.”
–Maxwell
“It's being prepared just the way I like it.”
–Wigfrid
“Is it done yet?”
–Webber
“Not quite dry enough.”
–Warly
“Getting unwet”
–Wormwood
“It's well on its way.”
–Winona
“It's drying.”
–Wortox
“Crabby lady! Dry stuff ready now!”
–Wurt
“It should be ready soon.”
–Walter
“I'll be old and grey before it's done...”
–Wanda
“Drying takes even longer in rain.”
–Wilson
“Forget the rain! Dry!”
–Willow
“Go away, rain! We are drying!”
–Wolfgang
“The rain is keeping it from drying.”
–Wendy
“RAIN INCREASES DRYING TIME”
–WX-78
“The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is like watching water dry... in the rain.”
–Woodie
“Moist and staying that way.”
–Maxwell
“All this rain isn't helping.”
–Wigfrid
“It's hard to dry when it's raining.”
–Webber
“Now it is more like a rehydrating rack...”
–Warly
“Rain can't help”
–Wormwood
“Not gonna make much progress like that.”
–Winona
“It's undrying day.”
–Wortox
“Not sure this thought through, flort.”
–Wurt
“Oh no, it's never going to dry in this rain!”
–Walter
“The weather is not cooperating.”
–Wanda
“In laboratory terms, we would call that "dry".”
–Wilson
“It's ready!”
–Willow
“Is very good and dry now!”
–Wolfgang
“The drying is over.”
–Wendy
“DEHYDRATION COMPLETE”
–WX-78
“The process has completed.”
–Wickerbottom
“That looks done.”
–Woodie
“Like the desert.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis as dry as an empty well!”
–Wigfrid
“Ma'am! It's dry!”
–Webber
“Et voilà! It is done!”
–Warly
“Done?”
–Wormwood
“Ready for eatin'.”
–Winona
“The food's ready.”
–Wortox
“Look even worse than usual, florp.”
–Wurt
“Your dried goods are ready, ma'am!”
–Walter
“I think it's been aged enough.”
–Wanda
“Drying things is not an exact science.”
–Wilson
“How long does it take this stuff to dry?!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang could punch water out, maybe?”
–Wolfgang
“It sways in the drying wind.”
–Wendy
“WETNESS IS TRULY THE WORST”
–WX-78
“Dehydration is a slow process.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is like watching water dry.”
–Woodie
“Still moist.”
–Maxwell
“It's drying öut nicely.”
–Wigfrid
“Is it done yet?”
–Webber
“Not quite ready yet.”
–Warly
“Getting unwet”
–Wormwood
“It's well on its way.”
–Winona
“It's drying.”
–Wortox
“That not look right.”
–Wurt
“It should be ready soon.”
–Walter
“It's like watching paint dry.”
–Wanda
“Rain, rain, go away. Be wet again another day.”
–Wilson
“Forget the rain! Dry!”
–Willow
“Sky tears is re-wetting the dry things!”
–Wolfgang
“The rain is keeping it from drying.”
–Wendy
“STOP MAKING MY THINGS WET, RAIN”
–WX-78
“The rain has temporarily halted the dehydration process.”
–Wickerbottom
“This is like watching water dry... in the rain.”
–Woodie
“Moist and staying that way.”
–Maxwell
“All this rain isn't helping.”
–Wigfrid
“It's hard to dry when it's raining.”
–Webber
“Now we're just watering it.”
–Warly
“Rain not helping”
–Wormwood
“Not gonna make much progress like that.”
–Winona
“It's undrying day.”
–Wortox
“Thought you said this make things dry?”
–Wurt
“Oh no, it's never going to dry in this rain!”
–Walter
“This isn't helping.”
–Wanda
“Sodium salty.”
–Wilson
“Nice. Free salt.”
–Willow
“Nice but Wolfgang trying low sodium diet.”
–Wolfgang
“Food without salt is like life without...”
–Wendy
“SODIUM OUTPUT”
–WX-78
“The salt is a bi-product of the dehydration process for certain things obtained from the sea.”
–Wickerbottom
“A little salty surprise there.”
–Woodie
“Salt? Finally some flavor.”
–Maxwell
“Salt! A gift fröm the göds tö seasön my meats!”
–Wigfrid
“We got salt!”
–Webber
“Salt! Precious salt!”
–Warly
“Some salty”
–Wormwood
“Bonus salt!”
–Winona
“Halt! There's salt!”
–Wortox
“Salt? Glurph!”
–Wurt
“Look at all that salt, Woby!”
–Walter
“Salt? That was easy.”
–Wanda
“The rack got dried.”
–Wilson
“Maybe the fire wasn't the best drying method...”
–Willow
“Cannot dry now.”
–Wolfgang
“It's done drying. Forever.”
–Wendy
“USELESS”
–WX-78
“It doesn't seem stable.”
–Wickerbottom
“Its usefulness has dried up.”
–Woodie
“It's too brittle to hang anything now.”
–Maxwell
“Such a shame.”
–Wigfrid
“It burned away.”
–Webber
“Too dry! Too dry!”
–Warly
“Oh”
–Wormwood
“Well, it's dry.”
–Winona
“A silly prank to be sure.”
–Wortox
“Oh well, flort.”
–Wurt
“It burned up!”
–Walter
“Oh botheration!”
–Wanda
Large Drying Rack is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the decoration score reaches 90 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 80 points. It can only be built within the Crabby Hermit's area.
The Large Drying Rack is a 9-slot Drying Rack. It can dry Kelp Fronds and produce Salt Crystals.

“It dried its best.”
–Wilson
“That's too bad. Time to burn it!”
–Willow
“Once big and mighty dry rack, now garbage. Sad.”
–Wolfgang
“Broken and abandoned.”
–Wendy
“GARBAGE”
–WX-78
“What a shame.”
–Wickerbottom
“What a waste.”
–Woodie
“Not surprised. It was poorly made.”
–Maxwell
“It hath fallen.”
–Wigfrid
“Aw, it's broken!”
–Webber
“Ah, c'est dommage.”
–Warly
“Broken”
–Wormwood
“No good to us now.”
–Winona
“The rack got the sack.”
–Wortox
“Crabby lady need new one.”
–Wurt
“I don't know if we can fix this, Woby...”
–Walter
“I'm afraid it's beyond repair.”
–Wanda
If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, Large Drying Rack at the original location will turn into Seaside Debris and can no longer be used. Even if Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Large Drying Rack will remain abandoned and cannot be used.

Too dry! |wortox = A silly prank to be sure. |wormwood = Oh |wurt = Oh well, flort. |walter = It burned up! |wanda = Oh botheration! |choose = wilson }} '''Large Drying Rack''' is one of Pearl's unique structures. It is unlocked when the [[Crabby Hermit#Decoration|decoration score]] reaches 90 points and will be locked again if the score drops below 80 points. It can only be built within the [[Crabby Hermit]]'s area. The Large Drying Rack is a 9-slot [[Drying Rack/DST|Drying Rack]]. It can dry [[Kelp Fronds]] and produce [[Salt Crystals]]. == Dryable Items == {{#lsth:Drying Rack/DST|Dryable Items}} {{clear}} == Seaside Debris == {{Object Infobox |name = Seaside Debris |image = Seaside Debris Build.png |structure = Yes |canBeBurned = 1 |deconstruct ={{pic32|Driftwood Piece}}×3 {{pic32|Barnacles}}×4 {{pic32|Rope}}×3 |tool = Can be [[Tools#Hammering_Tools|Hammered]] {{pic|32|Hammer}} |spawnCode = "meatrack_hermit_abandoned" }}{{Quotes |wilson = It dried its best. |willow = That's too bad. Sad. |wendy = Broken and abandoned. |wx78 = GARBAGE |wickerbottom = What a shame. |woodie = What a waste. |maxwell = Not surprised. It was poorly made. |wigfrid = It hath fallen. |webber = Aw, it's broken! |winona = No good to us now. |warly = Ah, c'est dommage. |wortox = The rack got the sack. |wormwood = Broken |wurt = Crabby lady need new one. |walter = I don't know if we can fix this, Woby... |wanda = I'm afraid it's beyond repair. |choose = wilson }} If Pearl is rehomed to a new location, Large Drying Rack at the original location will turn into '''Seaside Debris''' and can no longer be used. Even if Pearl is rehomed back to the original location, the Large Drying Rack will remain abandoned and cannot be used. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings}} * The '''Event''' skin does not drop normally.
